hotel_name: Khách sạn Sunland Hạ Long (Sunland HaLong Hotel)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The room cleanliness was average, barely acceptable. On the first night, I heard a soft rustling sound in the middle of the night, and when I turned on the light, it turned out to be a cockroach. 😅 There was no password-protected safe, and what I couldn't accept the most was that other room cards on the same floor could directly open my room. 😅 The female receptionist at the lobby on the first floor had terrible service. When we asked her for the key to check the electric scooter charge, saying I would pay immediately if it was okay, she refused. Then on the last morning, we were told we had to pay to eat breakfast, which left us confused. The hotel's breakfast was also awful; by around 8 AM, many items were already out, there were no drinks at all, and the food variety was limited... The location of the hotel was also a bit remote, and without renting a scooter, there was nowhere to go.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Room was very dirty. From the walls to the bathroom, it looked like it wasn’t even cleaned in between stays

reviews.title: No breakfast at Hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel infrastructure was very good with lot of investment going into the rooms. The staff was helpful. But the main issue is the location Bai Chai. Its a ghost town with around 10p hotels, and only 100 guests in all of them combined. You'll feel depressed after booking there. Do NOT book ha long city for more than 1 night. Book in Hon Gai area and use rented scooter to roam around.
Moreover, this hotel was badly managed as it did not have breakfast of its own and we had to go to a nearby hotel to have breakfast, which was stale shit. The hotel's AC filter was not cleaned since beginning amd had 1 cm thick clogging. Not recommended at all.

reviews.title: Rat eaten food in the room
reviews.positives: Good sized room
reviews.negatives:
When we got into our room i noticed a noodle box was lying broken into pieces behind the door. I soon realized, it was from a rat! 
They changed the room for us but the whole stay was left think if the hotel was infested and that we might have them crawl in our room when sleeping!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
The Junior suite was very spacious, modern and very clean. The jetted tub was amazing! I was pleasantly impressed! 
There was some hallway noise, so earplugs help.
I would stay here again!

reviews.title: Got ripped off through their lies. things.
reviews.positives: The staffs were dishonest.  When booking for tours, they promise not just balcony but terraces.  What we got is a room that doesn't have windows that open. We paid for other upgrades but got a boat that is old dirty.  The trip was to include travel from Hanoi.  We live there in Halong town but get no discount.  They tell us to cancel the booking foe the room with Booking.com and book with them directly instead. They seem to be in it for the money and not to benefit the client.
reviews.negatives: The food was generic and same everyday.  The room has many strict rules like no food allowed. The staff were dishonest in their business transaction and bookings.

reviews.title: Good value in ghost town
reviews.text: Hotel is fine and cheap, but it is located in an unfinished chinese investment city block. There are only hotels and everything else is empty. Restaurants is a km walk away

reviews.title: I’d book a different hotel next time.
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel was in an area with unoccupied very nice four story buildings.  Wide street with nice sidewalks, very little traffic.  So it was very quiet.
reviews.negatives: The hotel location was not centrally located.  The breakfast Buffett was not very good.  Had to walk a few blocks to get coffee or anything.

reviews.title: Back packing trip
reviews.text: We were traveling around Vietnam so stayed at several hotels. For the money the Sunland was great. We had a 5th floor room so a bit smaller than the other floors. The room was fine, however there were a few things that needed attention. The towel rail was loose and coming off the wall. The shower enclosure needed to be sealed at the base as water leaked underneath and into the rest of the bathroom and around the main window in the room the molding had rotted and was loose in one corner obviously from a water leak at some point. Other than that, our stay was great. the staff were extremely friendly and helpful, and the breakfast was always hot with lots to choose from. My wife wasn't partial to the coffee but that was mainly getting used to the way they make drip coffee in Vietnam and nothing against the hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It was a very good location. Also the staff were nice and the hotel was really clean.
reviews.negatives: We had to walk about 3 mins to another hotel for breakfast which had no vegetarian food options other than bread and vegetables

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: i am ok for the stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Comfortable hotel.
reviews.negatives:
It’s very far from everything, and it’s located in a neighborhood that’s been built, so no much to do around. There are no coffee places, restaurants or anything near.

Also, somebody brought durian to our room and if you opened the fridge it smelled like it… yuck!

reviews.title: A bit outside town
reviews.text: The hotel is in a complete ghostown. Nothing more than a couple of other hotels and many empty buildings. But the staff and was very helpful and a very nice and big room with comfortable beds

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very comfortable rooms
reviews.negatives: Pool was green and slimy so couldn't use it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Convenient location near the center, new clean hotel with amenities.

reviews.title: Good stay but needs more attention in maintenance and cleaning.
reviews.positives: The location was fine.
reviews.negatives: Although a relatively new hotel there are two issues that I would like to mention. One is the lack of proper maintenance (there was humidity on the window wall) and the other is the lack of proper cleaning. The floor and the bathroom needed more attention.

reviews.title: Average Hotel
reviews.text: An average hotel to stay in Ha Long City

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location, near Bãi cháy.  Price is cheap for room and location.  Breakfast is OK.
reviews.negatives: Hotel should be rated just 3 star or less for provided service.  Nobody helped with luggage at check in.  I booked a room with 3 guests.  They provided only 2 set of towels.  I had to request 3 times (from 2pm to 11pm) until I got the towel set for the 3rd person.  Also, my booking reservation just said that I must pay a total amount that already included all tax and fees.  It didn’t mention that I have Tö Pay this amount on cash.  However, at check in, the hotel required cash payment or they will add extra 3% for credit card payment Tö the total payment on my reservation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The new hotel with good facilities but quite far from the beach and no more activities around

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good.
reviews.negatives: Not much around. Maybe because it was not touristic season?

reviews.title: One night good hotel
reviews.text:
Was good value for one night, plus we arrived late only to sleep
In the morning there was someone shouting out the door about selling coffee

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Reasonably priced.  Nice little pool on the roof.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: We were only there for one night and it was good. Clean and spacious. It’s further from the main drag than I thought. Not much in immediate area but the area was quiet and calm which was nice. Took a grab into town when we needed to which was only a four minute drive and easy. Would stay here again.

reviews.title: My Family had a good staying in the Hotel, all the staff are very helpful.
reviews.positives: Breakfast is good

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Tranquility and architectural harmony in staying there would be a memorable event.
reviews.positives: The place is really fantastic and elegance outlook. You’ll love the architectural beauty of the hotel and surroundings. Service manager Lee is more than friendly and cooperative in ensuring the satisfaction of guests. That’s mesmerizing effort marked the line in memory.
reviews.negatives: Location is around 25 minutes walking from the centre and it’s bit hard in rainy days.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The 2-day, 2-night experience was great, the room was new, clean, well-equipped, and close to the center.

reviews.title: Wonderful staff

reviews.negatives: That not close to down town but close to ship harbour

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Stayed here before a cruise and was able to check in at 3am which was great, helpful staff. Breakfast was very minimal but did the job and pool unfortunately unusable as very dirty.

reviews.title: Good value for money.
reviews.positives: Loved the well appointed room and kind helpful staff.
reviews.negatives: The location was a bit far from where the action is.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is quite comfortable, quiet, and clean. I hope the hotel will quickly process my refund. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location and pretty quiet, very clean with friendly staff.

reviews.title: Reasonable for the price.
reviews.text:
The room is quite spacious with 2 large beds. The bathroom shower wall is leaking, causing water to flow onto the floor, making the bathroom damp and not dry. 

Overall, it is reasonable for the price.

reviews.title: Recommended for short trip
reviews.positives:
Breakfast is basic but delicious.
Staff upgraded the room in free charge.

reviews.title: good hotel
reviews.text: khách sạn nhỏ nhưng sach sẽ, vị trí cũng ok

reviews.title: I love this place, and I would absolutely come again.
reviews.positives:
The staff is friendly and speaks English well enough to actually hold a conversation.

The breakfast buffet is delightful.

The room was spotless.
reviews.negatives:
Subtle things (none of which really detracted from my stay, but I notified details):
- the shower leaked into the bathroom floor
- my view was into a wall (or through another window into a perpetually in fished sister hotel)
- the door lock was installed incorrectly. It locked, but I couldn’t double-lock it (not that I really needed to)
- electronic switches for a “do not disturb” sign, are too easy to miss, miss-use, or misunderstand. Doorknob hangers are the way to go.

reviews.title: Decent place
reviews.text: The stay was quite pleasant.

reviews.title: Great staff.  Great location.  Great hotel.
reviews.positives: Staff are great!  Mr. Lee was very helpful.  Location is good.  Room was great.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast.  Very limited.  Coffee was not good.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: My experience at the hotel was very good. Staff, room, facilities, all great. The only thing I won't rate high is the breakfast buffet, but I understand that I visited on low (extremely low) season and I was told the usual menu was different and the restaurant was actually closed. Very recommended.

reviews.title: I loved my stay in Ha Long and would recommend this hotel to families on leusure trip.
reviews.positives: The hotel is new and clean. It is near the main street but in a quiet area, so perfect location.
reviews.negatives: I liked everything but it’ll be great if breakfast could be improved a little.

reviews.title: Quite good
reviews.text: The location in the new area is quiet and convenient for parking due to the low population density. However, it is far from the residential area, making it inconvenient for shopping at the market. It is close to the yacht dock (20 minutes by taxi). The room is clean and pleasant. However, the sheets and pillowcases are a bit discolored, and I suggest the hotel pay attention to that. The breakfast is mediocre and not varied. However, the owner is accommodating: I saw the owner even went online to look for recipes for dishes that guests specifically requested, which was quite impressive. The coffee at breakfast is not good; it has a taste like roasted beans, and the hotel should change to a different type. Overall, my family had a fairly pleasant experience here. I recommend it for families with young children traveling by car.

reviews.title: A solid choice for parents who value both tech and peace
reviews.positives: Fast Wi-Fi kept my teenagers happy throughout the entire stay. Lily showed them how to connect multiple devices in our family room. The bathroom was spotless and had plenty of fresh towels for everyone. We appreciated the quiet policy at night which helped the kids sleep.

reviews.title: Perfect place to stay
reviews.text: Nice and clean. Polite and welcoming staff. I stayed here during winter time and room was perfectly warm

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Breakfast was the highlight of my mornings at the hotel. Liam was very attentive and kept my coffee cup filled daily. The noodle station was my favorite part of the whole buffet. Everything was fresh and the service was quick and very polite. It was a great way to fuel up for sightseeing

reviews.title: Great hotel for the money
reviews.text: Highly recommend this hotel for the price. Breakfast was good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I really appreciated the gym during my stay. It was clean, quiet, and I had it all myself today, which made the workout feel more relaxed. Lily was especially helpful — she took the time to show me how to use the treadmill properly and even brought over water, which made the experience feel very welcoming. It’s a great space for keeping up with fitness while traveling. Even in the evening, I felt completely safe exercising there. The equipment is modern, and the whole area is kept very clean and organized, which made it easy to enjoy the workout.

reviews.title: Great room
reviews.text: Hotel room was great, reception staff very helpful. Breakfast poor and the woman working here was rather rude.

reviews.title: I felt genuinely cared for throughout my time at Sunland
reviews.positives: Check-out was quick and effortless, which I really appreciated after my stay. Liam was especially helpful—he arranged a taxi for me and took the time to ensure the driver had the correct destination. As a solo traveler, this made me feel very comfortable and looked after. Small gestures like really make a difference in the overall experience. The lobby is spacious and nicely designed, with comfortable seating areas where guests can relax while waiting. The whole environment felt welcoming and well maintained.

reviews.title: Great staff.
reviews.text:
“Good Hotel! Great staff! ”
Allen recommended a cruise and a restaurant. The Cruise was great fun! The restaurant recommendation exceeded our expectations. Breakfasts were good. The room was very clean and had a great shower. Allen was so good at arranging a Pickleball game for us and a ride to the airport. The only downside was the pool was not usable. It’s too cold for most visitors at this time of year. We’d stay here again.
13 Feb 2025

reviews.title: I would definitely recommennd this place to other remote workers visiting the city
reviews.positives: This hotel turned out to be a great place for both relaxing and working remotely. I needed strong Wi-Fi during my trip, and thankfully the internet connection here was fast, stable, and reliable the entire time. Jenni was incredibly helpful and recommended a quiet area in the lobby where I could comfortably work for a few hours. The space had a calm and professional atmosphere that made it easy to concentrate. I managed to complete all of my tasks without interruptions or noise, which was exactly what I needed. As a solo traveler and digital nomad, I really appreciated how work-friendly the environment felt. The staff were welcoming and respectful of guests who needed to work during their stay. It’s rare to find a hotel that balances comfort, relaxation, and productivity so well. Overall, the experience exceeded my expectations.

reviews.title: Good Hotel! Great staff!
reviews.text:
Allen recommended a cruise and a restaurant. The Cruise was great fun! The restaurant recommendation exceeded our expectations. 
Breakfasts were good. 
The room was very clean and had a great shower. 
Allen was so good at arranging a Pickleball game for us and a ride to the airport. 
The only downside was the pool was not usable. It’s too cold for most visitors at this time of year. 
We’d stay here again.

reviews.title: A very comfortable and convenient base for families.
reviews.positives: This was a great choice for our family stay in Ha Long. The location couldn’t be better for visiting nearby theme parks and exploring the area easily. Jenni was very kind and gave us excellent suggestions that helped us save a lot of time at the attractions. We loved spending our evenings walking to the main square and enjoying the local energy. The room was calm and quiet, which worked perfectly for our baby’s naps during the day.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
+ Great value for money
+ Good Breakfast
+ Big room (with bathtub)
+ Clean and everything is new
+ Close to a 4 Star Hotel experience
+ 5min away from clean Beach
+ Quite location (no noice from the loud club in the room) 
+ Good price 

- Ghost town (which we enjoyed after some days in Hanoi)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Our family was very impressed by how convenient and well-located this place was during our trip to Hanoi. Many famous tourist attractions were nearby and easy to access, which made sightseeing much easier for us each day. We didn’t need to spend too much time commuting, so we could focus more on enjoying our vacation together. The area around the property also felt very safe, clean, and welcoming for families. We enjoyed walking around and exploring the local neighborhood without any concerns. There were plenty of restaurants, convenience stores, and cafes nearby, which added even more comfort to our stay. Traveling as a family becomes much more enjoyable when everything is easy and accessible, and this location provided exactly that. The convenience truly made a big difference in our overall experience

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: very friendly reception lady staff and very helpful and cooperative

reviews.title: We really enjoyed how convenient everything was during our stay
reviews.positives: Booking day tours was very simple, and most pick-up spots were close to the hotel, which helped a lot since we were traveling with kids. The staff were always friendly and took the time to explain directions clearly, making it easy for us to plan each day without confusion. Because of this, our trip around Hanoi felt much smoother and more relaxing. My whole family was very happy with the experience and appreciated all the helpful support.

reviews.title: The Best Hotel!
reviews.text:
We are on a long stay here, and we are very happy we chose Sunland. It is a lovely place. The room is spacious and very clean. The shower is always hot and has god pressure. We have a bathtub too! The WiFi is very good, the bed very comfortable. Nothing is lacking in the rooms.  Good quality towels and bedding. The location is great, very close to the beach and there are lots of small shops and restaurants around. The staff are exceptional. They go above and beyond to help you and they do it with grace and kindness. Nothing is too much trouble. The breakfast is simple, but ample and tasty. Rice, noodles, bread, fruits, eggs, soup, tea, coffee and juices. 
It is a great hotel and definitely a top pick for Halong.

reviews.title: Overall, it’s a fantastic spot for a family holiday
reviews.positives: The location was incredibly convenient, with just a short walk to both the city center and the beach. It only took a few minutes, which made getting around very easy for my family. We really appreciated not having to rely on transportation all the time. There were plenty of tourist services nearby, from restaurantss to small shops and tour options. Everything we needed was within easy reach. In the evenings, we enjoyed relaxing walks around the area, which felt safe and comfortable. The atmosphere was calm yet lively enough to keep things interesting. It made traveling with family much more enjoyable. We could explore without feeling rushed or tired.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and well-equipped.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: One thing that gave me great peace of mind during my stay was the safe and well-lit surroundings at night. The streets leading to the night market and nearby cafes have a lively yet very civilized and polite atmosphere. The presence of 24/7 convenience stores around the hotel provides maximum convenience for any personal needs, creating a comfortable and reliable living environment.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The receptionist is very thoughtful: convenient hotel services. Thank you for your enthusiastic reception.

reviews.title: It was a comfortable and well-organized stay for our group
reviews.positives: We stayed here as a group of three and had a very good experience overall. The service was reliable and the staff were always polite and approachable. Our room had enough space for all of us to move around comfortably. Even with three people sharing, it never felt too tight. The housekeeping team kept everything very clean during our stay. Each day we came back to a tidy room, which we really appreciated. One thing that made the trip easier was being able to book an island tour directly through the hotel. The process was simple and the prices were clearly listed. Jennie at the front desk helped us with check-in and made the process quick and efficient. She was friendly and professional at the same time. That positive first impression set the tone for the rest of our stay. Overall, everything went smoothly and without any issues.

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: Very comfortable accommodation and worth the price. The location is very strategic and various facilities are available. Very helpful and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: One thing I truly loved about this place was the genuine care shown by the staff. Traveling with my elderly parents, I always hope for a comfortable and safe experience. The electric buggy driver really stood out by driving slowly and carefully, making sure my parents felt at ease. It was a simple act, but it showed real thoughtfulness. The room added to the experience as well, with its wooden interior creating a warm and cozy atmosphere. It felt peaceful and welcoming, almost like being at home. These little details made a big difference. They turned a normal stay into a memorable one.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn miễn phí nâng hạng phòng. Phòng mới, sạch sẽ, lễ tân nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: This hotel is perfect for anyone traveling solo
reviews.positives: Everything about the services was explained clearly before payment, so I felt informed and confident from the start. Liam at reception was amazing—attentive, friendly, and genuinely helpful. I felt safe, well cared for, and comfortable throughout my stay. For solo travelers who want convenience, clarity, and friendly service, this place is a total win.

reviews.title: Good Stay
reviews.text: Pleasant Stay. Beach is at the walkable distance.

reviews.title: Services matched the description
reviews.positives: I combined business and leisure, so flexibility was important. The hotel supported early check-in when available. Receptionist Lily was helpful.

reviews.title: I received a better value than expected.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, and the staff are super friendly and accommodating. I booked dinner at the hotel, ordering 10 servings for 8 adults and 8 children, and the hotel prepared abundant food, even giving us extra fish cakes outside of the set menu. Overall, it’s a 10/10. Thank you for making our trip enjoyable and comfortable.

reviews.title: It made planning my trip so much easier and more enjoyable
reviews.positives: Although the hotel is on the smaller side, the level of service definitely stands out. The staff were attentive and made sure everything went seamlessly during my stay. I booked a transfer to Ninh Binh as well as a day tour through them, and both were arranged very efficiently. Jennie at the front desk was especially helpful—she replied quickly to all my questions and explained everything clearly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: KS near the sea, clean, enthusiastic staff, will come back!

reviews.title: The hotel felt luxurious and relaxing
reviews.positives: The room was spotless and stylish. The island tour was worth trying. Staff were always welcoming. Lily made our stay even better.

reviews.title: Clean and beautiful hotel.
reviews.text: The staff is cheerful and enthusiastic. The interior is beautiful and clean.

reviews.title: A perfect stay for a group of friends
reviews.positives: The room was spacious, clean, and bright. The boat ride was smooth with beautiful views. Staff were warm and helpful. Jennie took great care of us.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New, clean, and beautiful interior. Staff are enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Our group loved this hotel for its stylish and clean vibe\
reviews.positives: The wooden decor looked premium. The room was spacious for hanging out. The island tour was exciting. Liam handled everything professionally.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful and clean. The owner and the receptionists are friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: We will return next time
reviews.positives: A memorable family stay at this hotel. Clean rooms, great service, and convenient location. My kids slept very well each night. Thanks to Jennie and Liam for their support.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, tiện nghi đầy đủ. Điều làm mình ấn tượng nhất là anh quản lí cực kì nhiệt tình và dễ tính, khiến cho mình rất thoải mái. Đồ ăn ngon, hôm đó mình đặt cơm gọi món khá oke, giá cũng hợp lí. Nếu có dịp tới QN, nhất định sẽ quay lại lần 2.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hotel impressed us with cleanliness and professionalism. The wooden interior felt luxurious and relaxing. Both car and boat tours were excellent. Staff were friendly and kind. Jennie gave us very detailed advice.

reviews.title: Reasonable choice
reviews.text: This hotel seems newly built, so the facilities are quite modern. The location is also near the center, making it easy to move around; however, walking to nearby restaurants or shops is quite difficult. The staff is very friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: We were very satisfied
reviews.positives: Traveling independently, we needed local advice. Reception gave clear and helpful tips. The family room fit five comfortably. Lily’s arranged an easy airport transfer.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Clean and new

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We chose this place for a quiet and private stay, and it was the right decision. The room wasn’t luxurious but clean and well-equipped. The sea tour was organized simply and efficiently. Thanks to Liam for helping us adjust our pickup time.

reviews.title: Ksan is close to the beach and Sunworld, making it suitable for those who want to go out or families with small children.
reviews.text: Good service, the staff are enthusiastic, and the room price has a discount on Agoda so I find it reasonable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We stayed at this hotel for one night before our island tour, and it was a very pleasant experience. The room was clean, well-maintained, and equipped with a reliable air conditioner and stable hot water, which made our stay comfortable. Breakfast was simple but tasty, providing a good start to the day. Lily took the time to explain the details of our tour carefully, which helped us feel prepared and more at ease. The location was convenient, making it easy to reach the departure point for our trip. The staff were friendly and attentive, offering helpful advice whenever needed. Even though we stayed only briefly, everything was organized smoothly, which made the experience stress-free. The room was cozy, and the hotel had a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere. Overall, it’s a reasonable and practical choice, especially for young friends or small groups looking for comfort without breaking the budget.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: We left feeling rested and satisfied with our choice
reviews.positives: My partner and I were looking for a quiet place to unwind, and this hotel delivered exactly that. The room was spotless and peaceful, making it easy to relax and sleep comfortably. After long days of sightseeing, that kind of calm environment was exactly what we needed. One evening, we joined a sunset tour arranged by the hotel. The booking process was straightforward and everything ran smoothly. The tour started on time and was well organized from beginning to end. Lily helped us arrange it and was very pleasant to deal with. She was friendly, patient, and never once made us feel pressured to buy additional services. Her respectful attitude really stood out. It felt like she genuinely wanted us to enjoy our stay rather than just sell something. Those small details made the experience even better. The hotel has a relaxed atmosphere that suits couples very well.

reviews.title: Good value for the money spent.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the Shophouse area of Sun Plaza. The surroundings are still quiet; however, the rooms are clean and spacious. With a price of 390k/night for a family of 2 adults and 2 children, it is very reasonable. Many families with their own vehicles also stay here because they spend a lot of time out during the day and do not want to incur hotel costs just for sleeping.

reviews.title: We truly appreciated it
reviews.positives: We traveled with elderly parents and young kids, so convenience mattered. Elevators were fast and rooms quiet. Staff were polite and helpful. Liam’s recommended suitable attractions for all ages.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel, clean and spacious rooms, cheap price compared to the quality of the hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We reserved a family room for four people and were immediately impressed when we arrived. The room had a modern design but still felt comfortable and cozy. It was a great balance of style and practicality. There was plenty of space for our family to relax and settle in. After a long day out, it was nice to return to such a welcoming environment. The staff were particularly kind to our children, which we truly appreciated. They were friendly, attentive, and always ready to help. It made the atmosphere feel relaxed and family-friendly. We also received great assistance from Liam’s during our stay. They helped arrange a day trip for us at a very reasonable price. The experience was easy to organize and well worth it. The excursion added a special highlight to our trip. Thanks to the comfortable room, helpful staff, and thoughtful service, our stay became a wonderful family memory.

reviews.title: NewSun Hotel Ha Long
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, the rooms are spacious, clean, and the quality is good while the prices are cheap. It is an ideal place to relax.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We visited Ha Long for a relaxing weekend trip and stayed at this hotel during our visit. The location worked perfectly for us, as it is close to the beach and surrounded by many restaurants. Everything we needed was within walking distance, which made our stay very convenient. The room was quite spacious and comfortable. We especially liked the large window that filled the room with natural light. It made the space feel open and bright throughout the day. After spending time exploring the city and nearby attractions, it was a pleasant place to return to. Liam at the front desk was incredibly helpful. He assisted us in arranging a tour to Ha Long Bay and made the whole process very easy. Everything was organized smoothly, and we didn’t have to worry about any details. His friendly attitude and helpful advice really improved our experience

reviews.title: Loin du centre-ville
reviews.text: Quartier distant du centre-ville, désertique. Petit déjeuner compris mais inexistant. Hôtel adapté aux touristes locaux avec voiture.

reviews.title: Our family of four had a truly comfortable and enjoyable stay here
reviews.positives: The room was spacious enough for all of us, which made a big difference when traveling with kids. Everything was spotless and well-maintained, and we especially appreciated how quiet it was at night. It created a relaxing environment where everyone could rest properly. The breakfast offered a good variety of options, which is always important when traveling as a family. There was something for both adults and children, making mornings easy and stress-free. A special thank you to Jennie for arranging an early check-in for us — that thoughtful gesture helped us settle in right away after a long journey. She also shared some very helpful travel tips that made exploring the area much easier. Overall, the service and comfort exceeded our expectations. We felt welcomed and well looked after throughout our stay.

reviews.title: Chambre magnifique
reviews.text: Très bel hôtel. Chambre superbe et bien équipée. Juste on aurait cru une ville fantôme, rien à faire au alentour. Tout est fermé ou en construction.

reviews.title: I’d happily stay here again in Ha Long.

Everything was impeccably clean, Wi-Fi was strong, and housekeeping was excellent. The friendly smiles from the staff added a personal touch that made the stay even more enjoyable.

reviews.title: Thất vọng
reviews.text: M đặt bên Sunland nhg lúc m đến nhận phòng, m muốn lấy phòng sớm thì bạn lễ tân giới thiệu m sang Crystal Holiday cùng hệ thống để nhận phòng. Đi từ Sunland sang Crystal cũng xa phết đấy, bạn ý gọi taxi cho cũng phải mất mấy phút mới đến. Lúc sang nhận phòng thì m thất vọng hoàn toàn. Vào phòng k có bất kể 1 cái j ngoài cái giường. Tivi thì hỏng k bật đc. Đồ ăn mất phí thì k có 1 cái j. Lúc nhận phòng cũng k ai hỗ trợ đưa lên phòng. ĐT gọi xuống lễ tân cũng hỏng, m phải chạy xuống gọi bạn lễ tân lên bảo phòng k có cái j, rồi tivi hỏng nhé k lúc trả phòng lại tính phí của m. Đặt phòng 3 người thì cái gì cũng để có 2, m phải xuống xin thêm 1 đôi dép nữa. Đi chơi cả ngày về mệt muốn tắm nc nóng cho sảng khoái thì ối zời ơi k có 1 giọt nc nóng nào luôn, chạy xuống bảo bạn lễ tân thì bạn ý bảo m cách vặn nc nóng nhg lên mở cũng k có 1 giọt nào làm cả nhà m phải tắm nc lạnh, may trẻ con nhà m cũng lớn rồi nên con chịu đc chứ phải nhà trẻ nhỏ thì k biết tn. Địa điểm cũng k thuận tiện cho việc đi lại lắm, nhà m book xe đi vào lúc cao điểm xe còn k thèm nhận kêu về khu đấy k thuận đg nên k chở. Ăn sáng thì quá lèo tèo vài món linh tinh. Mà m đặt phòng với giá k hề rẻ tí nào nhg trải nghiệm thì quá tệ k xứng với số tiền m bỏ ra. Nếu bạn nào book Sunland mà bảo chuyển sang Crystal Holiday thì đừng chuyển nhé. Đây cũng là bài học cho gđ m vì tin bạn lễ tân bên Sunland kêu bên Crystal là ks mới của nhà e. M sẽ k bao giờ book Sunland nữa đâu. Crystal Holiday thì càng k bao giờ.

reviews.title: Perfect for adventure lovers
reviews.positives: Canoe and boat rentals are available for island tours.

reviews.title: Peaceful
reviews.positives: I really appreciated how fast and respectful the staff were when helping me get a car.

reviews.title: Incredibly convenient.
reviews.positives: Getting to the pier couldn’t be easier – just a quick 10-minute taxi ride from the hotel!

reviews.title: Safe for your convenience
reviews.positives: The room includes a mini fridge, hairdryer.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It’s super easy to book train, bus, or park tickets right at the hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A great breakfast selection with both Asian and Western options to suit all tastes.

reviews.title: Really enjoy
reviews.positives: I'll be staying at this hotel again on my next holiday

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A great selfie spot right in the lobby — stylish and totally Instagrammable!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We really enjoyed the drinks at the bar — they were both tasty and affordable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: An unforgettable holiday thanks to seamless, top-to-bottom service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: If you're looking for the perfect place to watch the sunset in Ha Long, this spot is a must-see

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I had my birthday celebration here and was pleasantly surprised by the complimentary decorations.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: They even offer free umbrellas when it rains—such a thoughtful touch!

reviews.title: I had a really pleasant stay here.
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a perfect location—just a short walk to the marina and entertainment spots, which made getting around super convenient. The service was genuinely great; the staff were friendly and always willing to help. My room was clean, comfortable, and had everything I needed. What surprised me most was how reasonable the price was for what I got. I think this hotel is a great option for everyone—whether you're traveling alone, with family, or on a business trip.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Rented a scooter and explored the city at night — super fun and saved a lot on transport. The hotel’s location made getting around really easy.

reviews.title: Definitely a place I’d consider staying again.
reviews.positives: The service here is also worth mentioning. The staff were consistently polite, welcoming, and quick to offer help whenever I had questions. Whether it was food recommendations or tips on local attractions, they were always happy to assist. Overall, I’d rate my experience a 9 out of 10.

reviews.title: From the moment I arrived, the staff made me feel right at home.
reviews.positives: The receptionist was super friendly and went out of their way to suggest local food spots and fun things to do around town. I really appreciated how easy it was to book a bay cruise directly through the hotel—no hassle at all. They also rent out scooters, which made it so fun and easy to explore the city at my own pace. It felt like more than just a place to sleep—it added to the whole experience of my trip

reviews.title: It’s the kind of place I’d happily return to on my next trip.
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a fantastic location — right in the center, so it was super easy to get around and explore nearby spots. There’s a pool on-site, which is great for relaxing, but if you’re more into the beach, it’s just a short walk away. Breakfast was another highlight, with plenty of choices to suit different tastes. Honestly, for the price I paid, I was really impressed with the value.

reviews.title: Their hospitality really stood out and made me feel right at home.
reviews.positives: From the moment I arrived, I felt genuinely welcomed. The hotel owner personally greeted me and the staff offered a cool glass of orange juice while I checked in — such a nice touch after a long trip. The lobby area is stylish and inviting, creating a great first impression. Even though I showed up a bit earlier than the standard check-in time, the team still went out of their way to get me into my room as soon as possible.

reviews.title: Everything was well-organized and stress-free.
reviews.positives: One thing that really stood out was how friendly and helpful the staff were. They made everything so easy for us, from booking tours and cruises to arranging transportation. We felt confident putting our plans in their hands and appreciated not having to shop around outside.
